```{=latex}
\newpage

\hypertarget{acknowledgements}{\chapter*{Acknowledgements}\label{acknowledgements}}
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{Acknowledgements}
```

I would like to thank...

::: content-hidden

parents - for developing me into the overwhelmingly curious and reasonably skeptical person I am

scott - for modeling strength of character

A portion of this research was funded by ICAMS Oshkosh project.
:::
